posts.title: AI News Roundup: US Government Shuts Down Claude Fable 5 and Mythos 5, OpenAI's $852B IPO Filing, Google Signs $920M/Month SpaceX Compute Deal — June 14, 2026
posts.excerpt: The US government forces Anthropic to shut down Claude Fable 5 and Mythos 5 under a national security export directive, OpenAI confidentially files for an $852B IPO, Google signs a $920M/month deal with SpaceX for AI compute capacity, and Meta employees push back hard against Zuck's mandatory AI hackathon.

posts.excerpt: SpaceX closes its first trading day at a $2 trillion valuation making Elon Musk the world's first trillionaire, Google launches Gemini 3.5 Live Translate across 70+ languages, Apple's Siri AI begins rolling out with iOS 27, and Nvidia-backed Neura Robotics secures $1.4B to scale humanoid robots.

posts.title: AI News Roundup: Microsoft Blocks Fable 5, SpaceX IPO Eve, ChatGPT Learns to Dream, Stanford's Sobering AI Report — June 11, 2026

posts.title: AI News Roundup: Anthropic Drops Fable 5 and a Safety Warning, OpenAI's IPO Race, Trump's AI Order, Meta's API Limbo — June 10, 2026

posts.title: Understanding BlockingQueue in Java: A System Design Primitive

posts.title: The Meaning of Onkar
posts.excerpt: The name Onkar is derived from the Sanskrit word Omkar — the embodiment of the sacred sound Om. It represents ultimate reality, universal consciousness, and the origin of existence.
